title: Colors
loginToSave: Log in to save your palette

onboarding.description: Personal color analysis reveals the colors that harmonize best with you
onboarding.aiDescription: Our AI analyzes your skin tone, eyes and hair to find your ideal color season

analysis.title: AI Color Analysis
analysis.description: Take a selfie in natural light, without heavy makeup, for a more accurate analysis
analysis.loginToSavePermanently: Log in to save your palette permanently
analysis.photoSecure: Your photo is processed securely and is not stored
analysis.faceNotMatchWarning: The detected face doesn't match your avatar. You can try again or continue anyway.
analysis.naturalLightTip: Make sure your face is well-lit and without heavy makeup for a more accurate analysis.
analysis.tryBetterPhoto: Try with a clearer photo, with natural light on your face.

explorer.title: Explore the 12 seasons
explorer.description: Discover the characteristics of each color palette

seasonDetail.seeRecommendations: See how your recommendations would look with this palette

temporaryPreview.seeHowItWouldBe: See how it would be to use this palette

makeup.title: Makeup
makeup.doAnalysisFirst: Do your color analysis to discover the makeup colors that enhance you the most
makeup.noColorsFound: No colors found with this filter
makeup.tipLips: Combine lipsticks with your accent colors for a striking look, or use neutrals for everyday.
makeup.tipEyes: Use lighter shadows on the lid and deeper ones in the crease for dimension.
makeup.tipFace: Blush should be applied on the apples of the cheeks, following your natural smile line.
makeup.tipNails: Nail polishes from your palette automatically harmonize with your clothes and accessories.

camera.checkPermissions: Could not access the camera. Check your browser permissions.
camera.faceNotDetected: Adjust your position — tap capture when ready
camera.positionFace: Position your face inside the circle
camera.moreLightNeeded: Find a spot with more natural light
camera.avoidDirectLight: Avoid direct light on your face
camera.positionFaceCircle2: Position your face in the circle
camera.turnHeadSide: Great! Now turn your head to the side
camera.detectionFailed: Detection failed. Try again or skip.
camera.captureUnlockedHint: After completing, the Capture button will be unlocked
camera.positionFaceCircle: Position your face inside the circle, with natural light on your face

tryPaletteToastDesc: See the preview in the "My Palette" tab

biometricAlert.title: Biometric verification required
biometricAlert.acceptConsent: Accept biometric consent to use the camera.
biometricAlert.doAnalysis: Do the color analysis to resolve all pending items at once.

consentModal.title: Biometric Data Consent
consentModal.description: To use the {{context}} feature, we need your consent to process facial biometric data.
consentModal.faceCaptureDesc: Your image will be captured by the camera for color analysis or avatar creation.
consentModal.securityCheckDesc: We verify facial movements (blinking, head turning) to ensure it's a real person, not a photo.
consentModal.faceComparisonDesc: We compare your image with your reference selfie to verify identity and prevent misuse.
consentModal.dataSecurityDesc: Processing is done locally on your device. No biometric data is shared with third parties. You can revoke this consent at any time in settings.
consentModal.agreeLabel: I have read and agree to the processing of my facial biometric data as described above.

faceMatch.notMatchDescription: The person in the photo does not match your profile. Use a photo of yourself for the virtual try-on.

errors.connectionFailed: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet and try again.
errors.serverError: The server is busy. Wait a few seconds and try again.
errors.generic: Could not analyze image. Try with a different photo.
